results.description: Verify SDC boundary extraction is complete and in-repo SDC share is negligible.
results.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import subprocess

repo_root = Path(
    subprocess.check_output(
        ["git", "rev-parse", "--show-toplevel"], text=True
    ).strip()
)
sibling_root = repo_root.parent / "sdc_2024_replication"
in_repo_root = repo_root / "sdc_2024_replication"

tracked = subprocess.check_output(
    ["git", "ls-files", "sdc_2024_replication"], text=True
).splitlines()
tracked_existing = sum((repo_root / rel_path).exists() for rel_path in tracked)

exclude = {
    ".git",
    ".venv",
    ".pytest_cache",
    ".mypy_cache",
    ".ruff_cache",
    ".uv_cache",
    "htmlcov",
}
all_files = [
    p
    for p in repo_root.rglob("*")
    if p.is_file() and not any(part in exclude for part in p.parts)
]
sdc_files = [p for p in all_files if p.parts and p.parts[0] == "sdc_2024_replication"]
share = len(sdc_files) / len(all_files) if all_files else 0.0

print(f"IN_REPO_SDC_EXISTS={int(in_repo_root.exists())}")
print(f"SIBLING_SDC_EXISTS={int(sibling_root.exists())}")
print(f"SDC_TRACKED_FILES_INDEX={len(tracked)}")
print(f"SDC_TRACKED_FILES_EXISTING={tracked_existing}")
print(f"SDC_SHARE={share:.4f}")

if (
    not in_repo_root.exists()
    and sibling_root.exists()
    and tracked_existing == 0
    and share < 0.01
):
    print("ASSERTION=PASS")
else:
    print("ASSERTION=FAIL")
    raise SystemExit(1)
PY
results.stdout:
IN_REPO_SDC_EXISTS=0
SIBLING_SDC_EXISTS=1
SDC_TRACKED_FILES_INDEX=271
SDC_TRACKED_FILES_EXISTING=0
SDC_SHARE=0.0000
ASSERTION=PASS
